gt(r,{async:!0}),(0,P.useEffect)(()=>{l&&c===!1&&(o===!1||s?.consentedAnalytics===u.Accepted)&&i(`${d}gtm.js?id=${a||`GTM-TZ26LP8`}&dl=dataLayer`)},[i,o,s,c,a,d,l]),(0,P.useEffect)(()=>{let r=new yt({data:e}){let t=q(),{brochureBot:n,enableGtm:r}=T(),{url:i,site:a,handle:o,networkTier:s}=e||{};if(!i)return null;let c=new URL(i,`https://www.shopify.com`),u=typeof document<`u`&&document.querySelector(`meta[name="ssr"]`)?.getAttribute(`content`)===`false`;return(0,j.jsxs)(j.Fragment,{children:[v(`SHOPIFY_DUX_DEBUG_MODE`)!==`true`&&(0,j.jsx)(_,{service:v(`SHOPIFY_APP_SERVICE`),mode:v(`SHOPIFY_APP_ENV`),enableGtm:!0,enableGtmLoader:!1,enableActiveConsent:l.GranularCompact,locale:a.preferredLanguage||a.locale,eventHandlerEndpoint:`/__dux`,approvedCookiesList:ie,enableLogger:{cookieBlocker:!0,humanSignal:!0},cookieBlockerDryRunOnly:v(`SHOPIFY_CONSENT_MIDDLEWARE_DRY_RUN`,`true`)===`true`,extraMetadata:{isCached:u.toString(),...s&&{networkTier:s}},metadata:{pageId:o,handle:o,page:t,extraData:{currencyCode:a.currencyCode}},enableDenormalization:!0,disableLegacyTracking:!0}),r&&(0,j.jsx)(vt,{}),(0,j.jsx)(st,{}),(0,j.jsx)(pt,{requestQueryString:c.search}),n?.enabled?.({site:a})&&(0,j.jsx)(ht,{})]})}function bt(){return(0,j.jsxs)(j.Fragment,{children:[(0,j.jsx)(`link`,{rel:`apple-touch-icon`,href:`https://cdn.shopify.com/b/shopify-brochure2-assets/c97c60ca19c64a8b5378d9f9e971f7bd.png`}),(0,j.jsx)(`link`,{rel:`apple-touch-icon`,sizes:`120x120`,href:`https://cdn.shopify.com/b/shopify-brochure2-assets/c97c60ca19c64a8b5378d9f9e971f7bd.png`}),(0,j.jsx)(`link`,{rel:`apple-touch-icon`,sizes:`114x114`,href:`https://cdn.shopify.com/b/shopify-brochure2-assets/b13486e5693b246af63c66ab047a6b6b.png`}),(0,j.jsx)(`link`,{rel:`apple-touch-icon`,sizes:`72x72`,href:`https://cdn.shopify.com/b/shopify-brochure2-assets/8734d76c98437c8ae8a628bbeed3750a.png`}),(0,j.jsx)(`link`,{rel:`apple-touch-icon`,sizes:`57x57`,href:`https://cdn.shopify.com/b/shopify-brochure2-assets/193f18e4855704ef1716dc0cd750c1ee.png`})]})}function xt(e){let t=[];return e.includes(g.None)?[]:e.includes(g.BrochureV2TailwindV4)?[H]:(e.includes(g.BrochureV2)&&t.push(H),e.includes(g.Plus)&&t.push(Ne),t)}function St(e){let t=!1,n=!1;for(let r of e){let e=r.data;e?.isNextEdition!==void 0&&(t=e.isNextEdition),e?.isNewNavFooter!==void 0&&(n=e.isNewNavFooter)}return{isNextEdition:t,isNewNavFooter:n}}function Ct({data:e,title:t,children:n,metaDescription:r,isPureTitle:l,hasScrollRestoration:u=!1}){let d=o(),f=V(),{t:p,site:m}=A(),{manualHrefLangs:h,manualSocialShareImages:g,noIndex:_,noFollow:v,favicon:y,bodyClass:b}=T(),{isNewNavFooter:x}=St(d),S=[];_&&S.push(`noindex`),v&&S.push(`nofollow`);let ee=y||p(`htmlHead.favicon`)||ne,C=t||p(`htmlHead.pageTitle`)||`Shopify`,w=xt(f);return(0,j.jsxs)(`html`,{lang:m?.locale||`en`,children:[(0,j.jsxs)(`head`,{children:[(0,j.jsx)(Be,{title:C,isPureTitle:l}),(0,j.jsx)(`meta`,{charSet:`utf-8`}),(0,j.jsx)(`meta`,{name:`viewport`,content:`width=device-width,initial-scale=1`}),(0,j.jsx)(`meta`,{httpEquiv:`Accept-CH`,content:`ECT, as _,Fe as a,U as c,B as d,R as f,_e as g,Ce as h,q as i,V as l,I as m,$ as n,W as o,De as p,Y as r,Ie as s,Ct as t,je as u,M as v};
